question_intent: average royalty percentage for authors in publishers located in California who have sold more than 1000 books

plan.question_intent: average royalty percentage for authors in publishers located in California who have sold more than 1000 books
plan.detail_query: SELECT leaf_1.pub_name, leaf_1.title, leaf_1.au_lname, leaf_1.au_fname, leaf_1.royaltyper FROM {{leaf_1}} AS leaf_1

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT p.pub_name, t.title, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, ta.royaltyper
join_clauses: JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN publishers p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
JOIN (SELECT title_id, SUM(qty) AS total_sales FROM sales GROUP BY title_id) s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
blocks.group_by_clause: GROUP BY p.pub_name, t.title, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, ta.royaltyper
blocks.notes: authors in California publishers with more than 1000 sales

JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN publishers p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
JOIN (SELECT title_id, SUM(qty) AS total_sales FROM sales GROUP BY title_id) s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
WHERE (p.state = 'CA')
LIMIT 5

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN publishers p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
JOIN (SELECT title_id, SUM(qty) AS total_sales FROM sales GROUP BY title_id) s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
WHERE (p.state = 'CA') AND (s.total_sales > 1000)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN publishers p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
JOIN (SELECT title_id, SUM(qty) AS total_sales FROM sales GROUP BY title_id) s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
WHERE (p.state = 'CA') AND (s.total_sales > 0)
LIMIT 5

steps.sql:
SELECT p.pub_name, t.title, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, ta.royaltyper
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN publishers p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
JOIN (SELECT title_id, SUM(qty) AS total_sales FROM sales GROUP BY title_id) s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
WHERE (p.state = 'CA') AND (s.total_sales > 0)
GROUP BY p.pub_name, t.title, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, ta.royaltyper

preview.title: Cooking with Computers: Surreptitious Balance Sheets
Cooking with Computers: Surreptitious Balance Sheets

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT p.pub_name, t.title, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, ta.royaltyper
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN publishers p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
JOIN (SELECT title_id, SUM(qty) AS total_sales FROM sales GROUP BY title_id) s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
WHERE (p.state = 'CA') AND (s.total_sales > 0)
GROUP BY p.pub_name, t.title, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, ta.royaltyper) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

preview.title: Cooking with Computers: Surreptitious Balance Sheets
Cooking with Computers: Surreptitious Balance Sheets

steps.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.royaltyper)
FROM (SELECT p.pub_name, t.title, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, ta.royaltyper
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN publishers p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
JOIN (SELECT title_id, SUM(qty) AS total_sales FROM sales GROUP BY title_id) s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
WHERE (p.state = 'CA') AND (s.total_sales > 0)
GROUP BY p.pub_name, t.title, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, ta.royaltyper) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.royaltyper) AS avg_royaltyper
FROM (SELECT a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, a.state, t.title_id, t.pub_id, p.pub_name, ta.royaltyper
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN publishers p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
WHERE (a.state = 'CA') AND (ta.royaltyper > 60)
GROUP BY a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, a.state, t.title_id, t.pub_id, p.pub_name, ta.royaltyper) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.royaltyper)
FROM (SELECT a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, ta.royaltyper
FROM authors a
JOIN titleauthor ta ON a.au_id = ta.au_id
JOIN titles t ON ta.title_id = t.title_id
JOIN publishers p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
WHERE (p.state = 'CA')
GROUP BY a.au_id, a.au_lname, a.au_fname, ta.royaltyper
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT t.title_id) > 0)) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average royalty percentage across all author-title combinations published by California publishers where the title has at least one sale?
